title: AffectNet
fullTitle: AffectNet: A Database for Facial Expression, Valence, and Arousal Computing in the Wild
contribution: A large-scale facial expression dataset collected in the wild, widely used in affective computing research.

title: Deep Emotion Network
fullTitle: Deep Emotion Network for Image-Based Affective Computing
contribution: An early deep learning approach for learning emotional representations from images.

title: FERPlus Benchmark
fullTitle: FERPlus: Improved Benchmark for Facial Expression Recognition
contribution: A benchmark protocol with richer annotations for comparing FER methods more reliably.

title: ExpW Dataset
contribution: A real-world dataset for facial expression recognition under unconstrained conditions.

title: Video Emotion Prototype
fullTitle: Prototype for Video-Based Affective Computing Timeline
contribution: A placeholder entry demonstrating future scalability to video emotion analysis.
